touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Julian Allen introducing our CRM automation platform and its value for marketing agencies. No response received.
Attempted cold call to Julian Allen. Left voicemail highlighting how we help marketing agencies streamline their sales operations. No callback received.
LinkedIn message to Julian Allen mentioning mutual connections and CRM automation challenges at scale. Julian responded positively, expressing interest in learning more about our approach.

questions_asked.question: What makes your platform different from what we're currently evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform combines workflow automation with consulting support, and we specialize in marketing agencies at your scale.

touches.ai_summary: 10-minute qualification call with Julian Allen. Discussed CanyonMarket's current CRM pain points and confirmed they're actively evaluating solutions including Clari. Julian is VP of Sales and confirmed budget authority for tools under $100K.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a new CRM automation solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our current setup is fragmented across multiple tools, and we need better visibility into our pipeline across 40+ reps.

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline looking like?
questions_asked.answer: We typically handle onboarding in 2-3 weeks with dedicated support, and we'd work around your Q2 planning cycle.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Julian with overview deck and case study from similar-sized marketing agency. Highlighted our automation capabilities and consulting approach. Julian replied confirming he'd review before next call.
Cold email sent to Julian checking in on the overview materials. No response received.

14-minute qualification call with Julian. Reviewed the deck and discussed specific automation needs. Julian mentioned they're also looking at Clari and need to involve IT for technical evaluation. Confirmed 40-50 seat requirement.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently handling pipeline forecasting and deal risk assessment?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual right now, with spreadsheets and weekly pipeline reviews. It's time-consuming and inconsistent.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Clari for our size?
questions_asked.answer: We're typically competitive at the enterprise level, and our consulting package provides additional value. I can walk through detailed pricing in discovery.

objections: We're already in conversations with Clari and they have strong forecasting features.

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute discovery call with Julian. Deep dive into CanyonMarket's sales process, tech stack, and integration requirements. Discussed their 5200+ employee base and complex multi-product sales cycle. Julian confirmed Penelope Watanabe (SVP Revenue) would need to be involved for final approval.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current sales workflow from lead to close.
questions_asked.answer: We have a multi-touch model across email, calls, and events. Biggest gap is tracking engagement quality and predicting which deals will actually close.

questions_asked.question: What integrations are must-haves for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, HubSpot, and our custom data warehouse. We also use Slack heavily for deal collaboration.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform handle our volume? We're processing 2000+ leads per month.
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. We have several enterprise marketing clients at similar scale. I can share specific performance benchmarks.

objections: We need to make sure any solution doesn't disrupt our current Salesforce setup.
next_steps: Schedule demo with use case scenarios

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Julian with integration documentation, performance benchmarks, and proposed demo agenda. Also requested introduction to Tariq Garcia for technical discussion. Julian responded positively and made the intro.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over a demo environment we can test in advance?
questions_asked.answer: We can set up a sandbox with sample data that mirrors your use case. I'll coordinate with your IT team on access.

touches.ai_summary: 8-minute follow-up call with Julian to confirm demo logistics and agenda. Discussed specific scenarios to showcase during demo including pipeline forecasting and deal risk scoring. Julian mentioned urgency around Q2 implementation.

questions_asked.question: What are the top 2-3 scenarios you want to see in the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Pipeline accuracy, automated lead scoring, and deal risk alerts. Those are our biggest pain points right now.

touches.ai_summary: 8-minute call with Julian confirming demo attendees and timeline. Julian mentioned Clari is scheduled for their demo next week, so timing is critical. Confirmed we'd showcase consulting support as differentiator.

questions_asked.question: What happens after the demo if we want to move forward?
questions_asked.answer: Typically a technical evaluation with your IT team, then executive alignment meeting, followed by proposal. We can move quickly if needed.

touches.ai_summary: 47-minute demo with Julian Allen. Showcased pipeline forecasting, automated risk scoring, and CRM automation workflows. Julian was engaged and asked detailed questions about reporting capabilities. Highlighted consulting package as value-add versus competitors like Clari.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the risk scoring models?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable. You can weight factors based on your sales process, and our consulting team helps optimize the model based on your historical data.

questions_asked.question: Can we see the reporting dashboards your other marketing agency clients use?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I can share anonymized examples. Most clients focus on rep performance, pipeline health, and conversion metrics by channel.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what you've seen from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: Clari has strong forecasting, but we're looking for more automation in the day-to-day workflow. Your consulting approach is interesting.

objections: The UI looks more complex than Clari's interface. Would need to ensure adoption across the team.

touches.ai_summary: 47-minute technical evaluation with Tariq Garcia (IT Director). Covered architecture, security, data privacy, API capabilities, and Salesforce integration approach. Tariq asked detailed questions about data residency and SSO. Generally positive on technical fit.

questions_asked.question: Where is data stored and do you support EU data residency requirements?
questions_asked.answer: US and EU data centers available. We're SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. You can choose your data location.

questions_asked.question: What's the API rate limit and can we build custom integrations?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise tier has 10K requests/hour. Full API documentation available and we support custom integrations with developer support.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for technical validation?
questions_asked.answer: I can run through our security checklist this week. If everything looks good, we can approve from IT side within 7-10 days.

questions_asked.question: How does your Salesforce integration compare to Clari's?
questions_asked.answer: Clari has native integration, but we're hearing your approach is more flexible for custom fields and workflows.

touches.ai_summary: 43-minute second demo with Julian focusing on advanced automation scenarios and addressing UI/adoption concerns. Showed how consulting team helps with change management and onboarding. Julian seemed more confident about team adoption.

questions_asked.question: What would successful adoption look like for your team in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: 80% of reps actively using it for pipeline reviews, and leadership using forecasting dashboards weekly. We'd need strong onboarding support.

questions_asked.question: How long does the typical consulting engagement last?
questions_asked.answer: Standard package is 90 days with weekly check-ins. We can extend if needed. Most clients see strong adoption by week 6-8.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the automations plus consulting tier versus base platform?
questions_asked.answer: Base platform plus dedicated CSM, custom workflow builds, quarterly optimization reviews, and priority support. I can send detailed breakdown.

next_steps: Introduce Penelope Watanabe for exec alignment

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute executive meeting with Penelope Watanabe (SVP Revenue) and Julian Allen. Discussed strategic value, ROI projections, and alignment with CanyonMarket's growth plans. Penelope focused on forecasting accuracy improvement and sales efficiency gains.

questions_asked.question: What ROI are your marketing agency clients seeing in year one?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 15-20% improvement in forecast accuracy and 10-15% time savings on admin work. I can share specific client data under NDA.

questions_asked.question: How does this fit with our broader rev ops strategy?
questions_asked.answer: It centralizes your revenue intelligence and automates manual workflows, which aligns with scaling your 40+ rep team efficiently.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline and process from here?
questions_asked.answer: We're aiming to decide by end of month. Need to see final pricing, compare with Clari, and get IT signoff. Julian will drive internally.

touches.ai_summary: 10-minute follow-up exec meeting with Penelope. Clarified budget approval process and confirmed she has authority up to $100K annually. Discussed Clari comparison and our differentiation on consulting support. Penelope requested final proposal with 3-year pricing.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide multi-year pricing options?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we offer discounts for 2 or 3-year commitments. Typically 10% for 2-year, 15% for 3-year. I'll include in proposal.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Julian with formal proposal including 1-year, 2-year, and 3-year pricing options for 41 seats on automations plus consulting tier. Included ROI calculator and implementation timeline. Julian confirmed receipt and scheduled review meeting.

24-minute exec meeting with Penelope and Julian to review proposal. Discussed pricing at $64,800 annually for 41 seats with consulting package. Penelope asked about discount options and payment terms. Mentioned Clari came in slightly lower on base price but without consulting.

questions_asked.question: What flexibility do you have on pricing given we're comparing with Clari?
questions_asked.answer: I can discuss discount options with my leadership. What's the gap we need to close?

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payment terms instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We typically do annual, but I can explore quarterly for multi-year deals. Let me check with finance.

questions_asked.question: Beyond pricing, what else do you need to feel confident moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Pricing alignment and confirmation from IT that integration testing went smoothly. Tariq should have that by end of week.

objections: Clari's base pricing is about 8-10% lower, though they don't include the consulting package you're offering.

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute exec meeting with Penelope focused on negotiation. Discussed discount options and payment flexibility. Penelope indicated they're leaning toward our solution due to consulting support, but need pricing to be competitive. Requested 10% discount to close the gap with Clari.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to 2 years, can you get to 15% discount?
questions_asked.answer: I can propose 12% for 2-year commitment with quarterly payments. Let me get approval from my VP.

questions_asked.question: When would implementation start if we sign by end of month?
questions_asked.answer: We could kick off first week of next month, with go-live targeted for 3 weeks out. Consulting team would start immediately.

questions_asked.question: If we can meet on pricing, is there anything else blocking the decision?
questions_asked.answer: No, IT approved the technical side. It's really just getting to a number that makes sense versus Clari.

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute negotiation call with Julian. Discussed revised proposal with 12% discount for 2-year commitment and quarterly payment terms. Julian confirmed this would work from his side and he'd advocate with Penelope. Clarified final contract terms and start date.

questions_asked.question: Is the discount locked in if we sign by end of next week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I have approval through end of month. After that I'd need to resubmit.

questions_asked.question: What's your confidence level we can get this closed this month?
questions_asked.answer: High. Penelope is supportive, IT is green-lit, and the pricing works now. Just need final exec approval and legal review.

next_steps: Julian to get final approval from Penelope
Send to legal for contract review

touches.ai_summary: 25-minute exec meeting with Penelope to finalize terms. Reviewed revised 2-year proposal with 12% discount and quarterly payments. Penelope confirmed budget approval and directed legal to review contract. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline and success metrics.

questions_asked.question: What does your implementation process look like in the first 30 days?
questions_asked.answer: Week 1: technical setup and integration. Week 2-3: team training and workflow configuration. Week 4: go-live with dedicated support. Consulting team shadows throughout.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns from your side before we send to legal?
questions_asked.answer: No concerns. We're aligned on value and pricing. Legal will review standard terms but I don't anticipate issues.

questions_asked.question: Do you need any additional references or security documentation for legal?
questions_asked.answer: We have everything we need from earlier discussions. Legal will focus on contract terms, liability, and termination clauses.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Julian checking in on legal review status. Julian responded that legal has the contract and is reviewing. Expected turnaround in 3-5 business days. No major concerns anticipated.

Follow-up email to Julian with implementation kickoff plan and team introductions for consulting and customer success. Julian confirmed legal is nearly done with review and expects to have contract back with minor edits by end of week. Deal on track to close.
